name: Rhubarb Raisin Crumble
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 lb Rhubarb (trimmed and cut into 1-inch slices)
1/2 tbsp Orange zest, organic (finely minced or grated if possible)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the ingredients in a heatproof pan that is 13x8x2 inches.
2. The combined ingredients will seem dry; don't be concerned. The rhubarb will release liquid as it cooks.
3. Place the pan in a cold oven and set the temperature to 375°F.
4. Bake uncovered for 15 minutes.
5. Stir, then continue baking until the rhubarb is tender but still firm, about 10 to 15 more minutes.
6. Add maple syrup to taste if more sweetness is desired.
